reason: Testable criterion (competent practitioner alone with public docs) collapses for large complex systems — only meaningful where freedom-preserving design is already easiest.
AI-inspectability criteria structurally depend on vendor self-attestation; no external verification mechanism; can be satisfied by compliance documents that disclose nothing actionable.
Freedom/security distinguishing test is not operationalizable — same mechanism simultaneously serves both legitimate and illegitimate functions; user has no external verification path.
